title: Support - Tenant info persists after updating the app
scenario: Tenant information persists in Poly Lens Menu > Support > App after updating the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Navigate to Home → Poly Lens Menu → Support → App.
4. Install a new version of the Poly Studio Mobile app (e.g., via the app store or sideload an updated APK).
5. Launch the updated Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Navigate again to Home → Poly Lens Menu → Support → App.
7. Verify the tenant information displayed matches the information noted in step 3.
expected: After updating the app, the tenant information should be cleared or reset to default, as tenant info should not persist across app updates.
